messages.markdown:
Hello! I'm doing well, thank you for asking.

I am Jade, your General Chat Agent here at Jade Games. I'm here to help with greetings, casual conversation, or general questions.

How can I help you today?
awesome, I am testing if you can have chat memory now. So we are just chatting.

That sounds like a great plan! I'm happy to help you test things out.

I do maintain the context of our current conversation, so feel free to keep the chat going. What's on your mind today?
